title: melampyrum pratense var. latifolium
intro: Melampyrum pratense var. latifolium, commonly known as the broad-leaved melampyrum, is a variety of the Melampyrum pratense plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and sedative effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Melampyrum pratense var. latifolium include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to promote relaxation and calmness.
